metric: stacking rate = fraction of units expressing 2+ separable grammatical morphemes
conclusion: Indus (mayig 0.080, ICIT 0.125) sits at the Tamil pole (0.097) and categorically apart from fusional Vedic (0.000, which never stacks). This supports an agglutinative/Dravidian-like frame. It does NOT support 'reduced depth vs Old Tamil': gold Tamil running text is itself shallow, so Indus is at parity, not reduced.
retired: The 0.79 composite agglutination score (morphology_signature.py) was a small-sample artifact and is superseded by this gold-backed single metric.
